title: Arkades Skill Frontmatter
description: Strict frontmatter contract for skill files in arkades/skills. Validated by CI on every PR.

id.description: Kebab-case identifier; must match the filename basename.

name.description: Human-readable display name. Must match the body's # H1.

version.description: Skill content version in semver. Bump on material content/format change. Independent of the framework version.

appliesToWorkerTypes.description: UI hint — which worker types the picker recommends this for. Soft (worker still installable on others).

appliesToFiles.description: Optional. Glob patterns the skill is relevant for; the picker shows them as 'applies to' chips.

docsBaseUrl.description: HTTPS base URL for the framework's docs. fetch_docs resolves relative paths against this.

llmsTxtUrl.description: Optional. Upstream's own llms.txt URL. The pack's curated docs index is independent of this; both can coexist.

cacheTtlHours.description: Optional cache TTL override (default 24h). Use shorter for fast-moving frameworks.

forgeNotes.description: Optional Forge-specific overlay. The server appends this to the worker's system prompt after the primer. Use for project-specific conventions that aren't in the upstream docs.
